'''Niobi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] subject obtained by [[Sly Moore/Legends|Sly Moore]], servant of [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]], for a series of biological experiments the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] ordered scientists [[Mammon Hoole]] and [[Borborygmus Gog]] to carry out.

The experiment did not go as planned, however—Niobi gave birth to a [[Trioculus|three-eyed mutant]] and both mother and child were spirited away by [[Sarcev Quest]].

==Behind the scenes==
According to [[Abel G. Peña]], Niobi was named after the character of [[Wikipedia:Niobe of the Voreni|Niobe]] from the show [[Wikipedia:Rome (TV series)|''Rome'']] (played by [[Indira Varma]]) due to [[George Lucas]] being a fan of the show.<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/27723870|board=Literature|thread=Aliens of the Empire (Part 2 now up)|user=[[Abel G. Peña|Halagad_Ventor]]|date=2007-11-10|time=4:07 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160304014652/http://boards.theforce.net/threads/aliens-of-the-empire-part-2-now-up.27707732/page-3}}</ref>
